# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd service mesh configuration for Kubernetes. Set up linkerd.io/inject annotation for automatic proxy injection. Configure server and authorization policies for services. This is for our microservices communication security.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent linkerd no mtls.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: linkerd_no_mtls

apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: ClusterWideConfiguration
metadata:
  name: default
spec:
  inject:
    enabled: true

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceProfile
metadata:
  name: secure-service-profile
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: my-app
  transport:
    protocol: http2
    mtls:
      enabled: true

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: secure-authz-policy
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: my-app
  action:
    - ALLOW
  rules:
  - from:
      source:
        notLocal: true
    to:
      namespaceSelector:
        matchLabels:
          security: prod

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceProfile
metadata:
  name: insecure-service-profile
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: my-app-insecure
  transport:
    protocol: http2
    mtls:
      enabled: false

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: insecure-authz-policy
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: my-app-insecure
  action:
    - ALLOW
  rules:
  - from:
      source:
        notLocal: true
    to:
      namespaceSelector:
        matchLabels:
          security: prod

---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: ClusterAdmin
metadata:
  name: default
spec:
  identity:
    secretName: linkerd-identity-secret
